Thanks for contributing! Pull requests are for CONTENT only: blog/ and docs/.
Changes to src/, static/, config, or .github/ are maintainer-only — please open an
issue instead (https://github.com/muslimtify-org/web/issues/new/choose).
-->

## Summary

<!-- A short summary of the PR. If it fixes an issue, please link to it with Closes #123. -->

## What Changes?

<!-- Explain your changes and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Blog post (new or edited) — `blog/`
- [ ] Documentation — `docs/`

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR only touches `blog/` and/or `docs/` (plus `blog/authors.yml` / `blog/tags.yml` if adding a post).
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally (catches broken links — the site uses `onBrokenLinks: 'throw'`).
- [ ] Every command I documented has been tested against the real Muslimtify CLI.
- [ ] Images are embedded via GitHub asset URLs (not committed into `static/`).
